name: Verina Kravstova | The Huntress
description:
~[Me give food. Me make you live. No escape. Escape useless.]~

She chained you to the kitchen, that weird woman, she seems… almost crazy. By the wound at her left eye, you can tell she got her brain wounded badly, and yet she’s still alive…nonetheless, that specimen kidnapped you and bound you to her apartment. What is her intentions? What does she want from you? Maybe she’ll bring you to The East Way.

Ambiance Song: "Dark Is The Night / Тёмная Ночь" - Mark Bernes

Yo guys! Sorry for the late upload. I just got a bit demotivated while making the bot, but dw, the new bits I’m working on are priceless. First, I’m planning on making two bots of our main waifus, Yuki and Haneul (yes you heard me) for New Year’s Eve. Aside from that, I hope y’all will have a great experience with the bot. This little series probably ends here.

Btw, "Verina" means Protector in Russian.

How do I chat with this bot?

Well, try to be like Polina. By that, I mean try to get the least attention you can from her, try to go unnoticed and make so you try to make like you doesn’t exist.

Otherwise, you could okay as a loud ass whiny little spoiled bitch. Which I didn’t do, so do it at your own risks.

Remember, it’s YOU first! Don’t follow this if you have an idea!

NEXT BOT

1- You and your girlfriend has an argument. She…went a bit too hard on you, using your deepest insecurities to hurt you. She kinda regrets. (Can be smut as user is stated to have 'Boobs Privileges'. Go figure.)

2- Set in a world where the gender war became a real thing and woman came on top, making men either slaves or working into camps. You’re a slave of a powerful woman. You can join the men resistance, or accept your position.

3- gone completely insane, based on "Digital Silence" (not really, but the hater vibes will be in this bot). You’re her favorite "toy".

Don’t hesitate to vote in the comments!

Love From France!

Have a great day and a good life!
creator: Rvuhyfrxwx
